overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a luxurious cyberpunk-style interior lobby with golden decorative elements and tropical plants, approaching a glass exit overlooking a neon-lit city street at night. High-quality game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077.

segments.scene_description: Walking through a luxurious cyberpunk interior lobby featuring a large rectangular planter with lush tropical plants and an ornate golden screen wall. The space features warm artificial lighting and red carpet flooring.

segments.scene_description: Passing through the golden decorative screen and approaching floor-to-ceiling glass exit doors that reveal a neon-lit city street at night. The camera moves steadily toward the exit with urban buildings and lights visible through the reflective glass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a warm, opulent interior lobby toward the vibrant neon glow of a futuristic city street. It begins by gliding across red carpet flooring past a large rectangular planter filled with lush tropical plants and an ornate golden screen wall. As the camera moves forward, it passes through the decorative golden screen, shifting the focus from the interior's warm artificial lighting toward the exterior. The scene then opens up as the camera approaches floor-to-ceiling glass exit doors, where the reflective surfaces begin to reveal the towering urban buildings of a night-lit metropolis. Finally, the perspective settles on the vivid neon lights of the city street visible just beyond the glass.
